source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Right isosceles triangles are constructed on the sides of a 3-4-5 right triangle, as shown.  A capital letter represents the area of each triangle.  Which one of the following is true?

<image1>

image_dependency: 题干显式包含“as shown”并引用`<image1>`，几何构造依赖图示
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明关键信息不主要在文字中
需要识别在 3-4-5 直角三角形三边上构造的等腰直角三角形及其面积标注位置
multi_step: 要从图中对应出 X、Y、Z、W 各自代表哪条边上的面积，再判断代数关系
求解通常需要结合等腰直角三角形面积公式与 3-4-5 直角三角形边长关系（常伴随勾股关系）
虽然答案是单个选项，但不是直接读图，至少涉及图形识别加面积关系推断两步
verifiability: choices 提供 5 个明确候选式子，答案可直接核对为 E
answer_text 明确为 `$X+Y=Z$`，答案格式清晰
registry_passed=true，题目、图片、答案资产齐全，便于后续规则核验

decision_reasons: 题干、图像、答案资产齐全，asset registry passed 且无 issues，核心语义支撑完整
虽然题目强依赖图示，但所需图像已存在，且答案与选项关系明确，样本可恢复性和可核验性都高

normalized_value.title: Dataset Open Question
normalized_value.rewritten_question_text:
Right isosceles triangles are constructed on the sides of a 3-4-5 right triangle, as shown. A capital letter represents the area of each triangle.

<image1>
What equation relates the areas X, Y, and Z?

agent_assessment.rationale: The problem text clearly asks for a true area relationship among labeled right isosceles triangles built on the sides of a 3-4-5 triangle, and the image clearly shows the geometry, side lengths, and labels X, Y, Z, and W needed to interpret the choices and answer.

cleaning_records.decision_rationale: The sample is jointly understandable, the image is clear enough for the geometry, the rewritten open form preserves the target answer, and alignment and solvability signals indicate the annotation target is materially available.

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。
